title: Dino Control Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur Predator With Lights and Sounds - Green
description:
Dominate the prehistoric world with the remote radio control Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur. This 11" RC Dinosaur comes with a multi-function remote that allows you to control this predator's movements including forward function, fast forward function, dance function, and stop function. Watch this carnivorous beast come to life with awesome sounds and light up spikes on his back that set him apart from the competition. The Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur is the perfect gift for kids over 3 years old. Order yours before our inventory goes extinct!
